title: VICI Properties Inc. to Acquire Rocky Gap Casino Resort and Lease to Century Casinos, Inc.
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE: VICI) (“VICI Properties” or the “Company”), an experiential real estate investment trust, today announced it has, together with Century Casinos, Inc. (NASDAQ: CNTY) (“Century”), entered into definitive agreements to acquire Rocky Gap Casino Resort (“Rocky Gap”), located in Flintstone, Maryland from Golden Entertainment, Inc. (NASDAQ: GDEN) (“Golden Entertainment”) for an aggregate purchase price of $260.0 million in cash. Pursuant to the tr

title: Golden Entertainment Enters Into Definitive Agreements to Sell Rocky Gap Casino Resort for $260 Million
text: LAS VEGAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Golden Entertainment, Inc. (NASDAQ: GDEN) (“Golden” or the “Company”) announced today that it entered into definitive agreements to sell Rocky Gap Casino Resort (“Rocky Gap”) for aggregate cash consideration of $260 million. Pursuant to the terms of the agreements, Century Casinos, Inc. (NASDAQ: CNTY) will acquire the operations of Rocky Gap for $56.1 million, subject to customary working capital adjustments, and VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE: VICI) will acquire an inte

title: Storage Stock Making Space For New Breakout Move
text: Paying a 2.8% dividend while storing up demand from A+ funds, Extra Space Storage has its eyes on a new buy zone. The post Storage Stock Making Space For New Breakout Move appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: 3 High-Growth Stocks to Buy During the Market Dip
text: These high-growth stocks are down notably, but could make a roaring comeback.

title: 2 Supercharged Stocks to Buy Without Any Hesitation
text: These real estate investment trusts have trounced the broader markets so far this year. But both look to still be solid buys for income investors.

title: VICI Properties: Don't Rush Into It Now
text: VICI posted a solid Q2 card and reiterated its FY22 guidance. The market has also rewarded VICI for the visibility and quality of its underlying assets. However, VICI's surge from May is too fast, and its price action doesn't augur well as investors rushed in to seek shelter from worsening macro headwinds.

title: Buy 10 Inflation Buster Ideal Dividend Dogs In August
text: March-April 2022 UBS, Kiplinger, and Barrons analysts/reporters combined to list five sets of stocks sorted as: “Inflation Busters for 2022.” Those five articles revealed 48 equities, with 43 paying dividends.

title: This Dividend Stock Is Teeing Up a New Investment Direction
